title: The Incredibly Strange Creatures Who Stopped Living and Became Mixed-Up Zombies!!?
original_title: The Incredibly Strange Creatures Who Stopped Living and Became Mixed-Up Zombies!!?
overview: Jerry, his girlfriend Angela, and their friend Harold take a trip to a local seaside carnival, but when the carnival's fortune teller, Madame Estrella, predicts death for someone close to Angela, strange things begin to happen.
